title: Settings
pageDescription: Manage your Manuscript preferences and configuration.
bookSettings.title: Book Settings
general.title: General
general.description: Title, author, language, and genre of your book.
language.title: Display Language
language.description: Choose the language for the Manuscript interface.
appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the look and behavior of Manuscript.
appearance.theme.title: Theme
appearance.showAi.label: Show AI features
appearance.showAi.description: Show AI panels, preparation, and analysis across the app.
appearance.editorFont.label: Font
appearance.editorFont.description: The typeface used in the writing editor.
appearance.editorFontSize.label: Font size
appearance.editorFontSize.description: The text size used in the writing editor.
appearance.editorTextPosition.label: Text position
appearance.editorTextPosition.descriptio: Where the text column sits in the editor view.
appearance.hideToolbar.label: Hide formatting toolbar
appearance.hideToolbar.description: Hide the toolbar at the top of the editor.
appearance.sendErrorReports.label: Send error reports
appearance.sendErrorReports.description: Help improve Manuscript by automatically sending anonymous crash reports. No personal data or manuscript content is ever included.
appearance.update.bannerMessage: Version {{version}} is ready — restart to update
appearance.update.dialogDescription: A new version of Manuscript is ready to install.
appearance.update.errorGeneric: Something went wrong while checking for updates.
privacy.description: Help improve Manuscript by automatically sending anonymous crash reports.
privacy.analyticsDescription: Help improve Manuscript by sharing anonymous feature usage. No personal data or manuscript content is included.
updates.autoUpdateDescription: Download and install updates automatically when available.
license.title: License
license.formDescription: Enter your license key to unlock AI features, Canvas, and more.
license.error.network: Could not reach the license server. Please check your internet connection.
welcome.title: Welcome to Manuscript
welcome.description: Enter your license key to get started.
welcome.buyLicense: Don't have a license? Get one at getmanuscript.app
welcome.trialExpired: Your free trial has ended. Enter a license key to keep writing.
aiProviders.title: AI Providers
aiProviders.description: Choose your AI provider and configure its API key.
aiProviders.keyRecovery.title: Re-enter your API key
aiProviders.keyRecovery.description: Your saved API key could not be loaded after an app update. Paste it again to re-enable AI features.
aiProviders.testResult.invalid_key: The provider rejected this API key. Check that you copied the complete key, or create a new one and save it here.
aiProviders.testResult.insufficient_cred: Your API key works, but your account has no credit. Add credits in the provider console — see “How to get an API key” — then test again.
aiProviders.testResult.rate_limited: The provider is rate-limiting your account right now. Wait a moment and test again.
aiProviders.testResult.overloaded: The provider is overloaded right now. Try again in a minute.
aiProviders.testResult.timeout: The provider did not respond in time. Check your internet connection and try again.
aiProviders.howToGetKey.trigger: How to get an API key
aiProviders.howToGetKey.title: How to get your {{provider}} API key
aiProviders.howToGetKey.intro: Follow these steps to create an API key for {{provider}} and add credit to your account. Manuscript stores the key encrypted on this device — it never leaves your machine.
aiProviders.howToGetKey.copyHint: Copy this link and paste it into your browser to open the provider console.
aiProviders.howToGetKey.anthropic.steps: Copy the link below and open console.anthropic.com in your browser. Sign in or create an account.
Add credit first: open Settings → Billing and buy credits (minimum $5). Without credit, every request fails.
Open Settings → API Keys and click Create Key. Name it e.g. “Manuscript”.
Copy the key (starts with sk-ant-) right away — it is only shown once.
Paste it here, click Save, then Test connection.
aiProviders.howToGetKey.openai.steps: Copy the link below and open platform.openai.com/api-keys in your browser. Sign in or create an account.
Add credit first: open Settings → Billing, add a payment method and buy credits (e.g. $5). ChatGPT Plus does not include API credit.
On the API keys page, click Create new secret key and give it a name.
Copy the key (starts with sk-) right away — it is only shown once.
Paste it here, click Save, then Test connection.
aiProviders.howToGetKey.gemini.steps: Copy the link below and open aistudio.google.com/apikey in your browser. Sign in with your Google account.
Click Create API key and pick or create a Google Cloud project.
Copy the key right away, paste it here, click Save, then Test connection.
The free tier is enough to start. If you hit rate limits, enable billing for the project in Google AI Studio.
aiProviders.howToGetKey.groq.steps: Copy the link below and open console.groq.com/keys in your browser. Sign in (Google, GitHub, or email).
Click Create API Key and give it a name.
Copy the key (starts with gsk_) right away — it is only shown once.
Paste it here, click Save, then Test connection.
The free tier has daily limits. For steady use, upgrade under Settings → Billing.
aiProviders.howToGetKey.xai.steps: Copy the link below and open console.x.ai in your browser. Sign in or create an xAI account.
Add credit first: open Billing → Credits and buy credits. Without credit, every request fails.
Open API Keys and click Create API Key.
Copy the key (starts with xai-) right away — it is only shown once.
Paste it here, click Save, then Test connection.
aiProviders.howToGetKey.deepseek.steps: Copy the link below and open platform.deepseek.com/api_keys in your browser. Sign in or create an account.
Add balance first: open Billing → Top up and add funds. Without balance, every request fails.
On the API Keys page, click Create new API key.
Copy the key right away — it is only shown once.
Paste it here, click Save, then Test connection.
aiProviders.howToGetKey.mistral.steps: Copy the link below and open console.mistral.ai/api-keys in your browser. Sign in or create an account.
Activate billing first: open Workspace → Billing and add a payment method (or activate the free Experiment plan).
On the API Keys page, click Create new key.
Copy the key right away — it is only shown once.
Paste it here, click Save, then Test connection.
aiProviders.howToGetKey.openrouter.steps: Copy the link below and open openrouter.ai/keys in your browser. Sign in (Google, GitHub, or email).
Buy credits first: open openrouter.ai/credits and top up. Without credits, every request fails.
On the Keys page, click Create Key and give it a name.
Copy the key (starts with sk-or-) right away — it is only shown once.
Paste it here, click Save, then Test connection.
aiProviders.advancedDescription: The app automatically picks the best model for each task. Only change these if you fully understand the differences between models — wrong choices may reduce output quality or increase costs.
aiProviders.writingModelHint: Best results with the most capable model
writingStyle.title: Writing Style
writingStyle.description: Describe the prose voice for AI to follow when working with your book.
writingStyle.placeholder: Describe the prose voice, sentence rhythm, vocabulary, and distinctive features...
prosePassRules.title: Revision Rules
prosePassRules.description: These rules guide the AI whenever it works with your prose — revising, rewriting a selection, or continuing your draft.
prosePassRules.rules.show_dont_tell.desc: Convert telling statements to showing through action and detail.
prosePassRules.rules.dialogue_tags.label: Dialogue tag cleanup
prosePassRules.rules.dialogue_tags.descr: Replace adverb-heavy dialogue tags with action beats.
prosePassRules.rules.filter_words.label: Filter word removal
prosePassRules.rules.filter_words.descri: Remove unnecessary filter words (felt, saw, heard, noticed).
prosePassRules.rules.passive_voice.label: Passive voice reduction
prosePassRules.rules.passive_voice.descr: Convert passive constructions to active voice where appropriate.
prosePassRules.rules.sentence_variety.de: Vary sentence length and structure for better rhythm.
prosePassRules.rules.shorten_long_senten: Split a sentence only when it overloads the reader's working memory (~4 chunks): wide subject-verb gaps, more than two levels of clause nesting, or chained items beyond 3–4. Long, fluent sentences with locally connected clauses stay.
prosePassRules.rules.tightening.label: Prose tightening
prosePassRules.rules.tightening.descript: Remove redundancies and tighten wordy phrases.
proofreading.title: Proofreading
proofreading.description: Spell check and style analysis in the editor.
proofreading.spelling.title: Spell Check
proofreading.spelling.enabledDescription: Check spelling as you write and underline misspelled words.
export.title: Export
export.description: Export your manuscript as a file.
backup.passphrase.label: Passphrase (optional)
backup.passphrase.placeholder: Leave empty to save without encryption
backup.passphrase.hint: If you set a passphrase, the backup is encrypted on this machine before it leaves Manuscript. Save it somewhere safe — without it the backup cannot be restored.
backup.save.title: Save backup
backup.save.description: Download a copy of your data. Save the file anywhere — your computer, a USB stick, or your cloud drive of choice.
backup.import.title: Import backup
backup.import.description: Restore your data from a previously saved backup file. Your current data will be kept as a one-step rollback in case the imported backup is wrong.
backup.import.warning: Importing replaces your current data after restart. AI provider API keys may need to be re-entered if the backup was made on a different machine.
backup.revert.title: Revert last import
backup.revert.description: Restore the database from before your last import. This is one-shot — once reverted, the imported data is discarded.
backup.revertConfirm: Restore the database from before your last import? Your current data will be replaced. This cannot be undone.
backup.restart.import: Backup ready to import. Quit Manuscript and reopen to complete the import.
backup.restart.revert: Revert ready. Quit Manuscript and reopen to restore your previous data.
backup.restart.hint: Use the menu or close the window to quit. Reopening Manuscript will finish the operation.
backup.error.exportFailed: Could not save the backup. Please try again.
speech.title: Voice input for AI chats
speech.description: Dictate prompts instead of typing. Transcription runs entirely on your device with a local Whisper model — audio never leaves your computer.
speech.errorFallback: The download failed. Check your connection and try again.
speech.hint: The microphone button appears in AI chat inputs once the model is installed.
proofreading.style.fillerDescription: Words that can usually be cut without changing the meaning.
proofreading.style.weakVerbDescription: Pale verbs like “to make” or “to do” where a specific verb is stronger.
proofreading.style.filterWordDescription: Perception verbs (thought, felt, saw) that distance the reader — the practical show-don’t-tell check.
proofreading.style.patternDescription: Passive voice and other weak constructions.
proofreading.style.repetitionDescription: The same word appearing twice within a short distance.
proofreading.style.rhythmDescription: Sentence-length rhythm and a readability score in the style panel.
